name: tfg-fabian-gonzalez-lence-monorepo
description: Monorepo for TFG projects - CartographicProjectManager backend deployment

scripts.build: cd projects/4-CartographicProjectManager/backend && npm ci && npx prisma generate && npm run build
scripts.start: cd projects/4-CartographicProjectManager/backend && npx prisma migrate deploy && node dist/server.js
